title: PTD Leadership Commiserates With Niger State Govt, Families Of Victims Over Tanker Explosion - FinancialEDGE
description: The Petroleum Tanker Drivers (PTD) Branch of NUPENG has expressed profound sorrow over the tragic tanker explosion that occurred at Dikko Junction in Niger State, claiming several lives and many others injured as a result of deplorable roads infrastructure and strange attitudes of some citizens who were scooping the spilled product. PTD in a
html: The Petroleum Tanker Drivers (PTD) Branch of NUPENG has expressed profound sorrow over the tragic tanker explosion that occurred at Dikko Junction in Niger State, claiming several lives and many others injured as a result of deplorable roads infrastructure and strange attitudes of some citizens who were scooping the spilled product.
